# criblio_commit (Resource)

Commit Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "criblio_commit" "my_commit" {
  message = "Updated pipeline configuration for syslog parsing"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tools/codegen -->
## Schema

### Required

- `message` (String)

### Optional

- `effective` (Boolean)
- `files` (List of String)
- `group` (String) Worker Group to commit changes for.

## Import

Import is not supported for this action resource.
